rules.rationale: Margin level proxies pricing power and business model quality.
Stable margins indicate durable economics rather than one-off swings.
Scale correlates with resilience and institutional interest.
Leverage entering listing is the primary balance-sheet risk.
Short-term liquidity buffer.
Ability to service debt from operating profit.

rules.evidence: REVENUE CAGR 15.6% over the restated period
rules.rationale: Multi-year compounding, not just the latest pre-IPO year.
Multi-year compounding, not just the latest pre-IPO year.

rules.thresholds: every yoy step positive ‚Üí full points
rules.rationale: Consistency separates trend from a single dressed-up year.
Peer-relative pricing from the RHP's own mandated comparison table.

rules.evidence: Issue P/E 142.9x at upper price band
rules.rationale: Sanity check independent of the issuer-chosen peer set.

rules.evidence: Needs both issuer P/E and positive PAT CAGR

rules.rationale: Skin in the game after listing.

rules.evidence: OFS ‚Çπ0 cr of ‚Çπ760 cr total (0%) ‚Äî fresh capital ‚Çπ760 cr goes to the company, OFS to selling holders
rules.rationale: Exit-heavy offers raise nothing for growth; every manual analyst review leads with this.

rules.evidence: Our Promoter had agreed not to dispose, sell, charge, transfer, create any pledge, lien or otherwise
rules.rationale: Pledged promoter stakes transmit personal leverage into the stock.
Criminal matters against company/promoters/directors.

rules.evidence: No qualification language detected in the restated auditor's report
rules.rationale: Auditor reservations are the highest-signal governance flag in the document.

rules.evidence: No dividends declared in reported years
rules.rationale: A payout history modestly evidences real distributable cash.
Each finding is itemised in the Risks tab with its own evidence.

rules.evidence: Company claims: ‚Äú‚Ä¶largest‚Ä¶‚Äù ‚Äî note this is the issuer's own characterisation

Returns on capital are the core of business quality compounding.
Returns on capital are the core of business quality compounding.

rules.thresholds: all reported years positive ‚Üí full points
rules.evidence: CFO positive in 3/3 reported years (FY25: ‚Çπ149cr, FY24: ‚Çπ155cr, FY23: ‚Çπ108cr)
rules.rationale: Operating cash positivity streak.
Profit that never becomes cash is the classic earnings-quality failure.

rules.thresholds: FCF positive‚Üí10 ¬∑ negative‚Üí3 (heavy investment phase is common pre-IPO)
rules.rationale: Negative FCF is contextual pre-IPO; persistent negativity matters more.
